nasb.text: And standing over her, He rebuked the fever, and it left her; and she immediately got up and waited on them.

esv.text: And he stood over her and rebuked the fever, and it left her, and immediately she rose and began to serve them.

cnv.text: 耶穌站在她旁邊，斥責那熱病，熱就退了；她立刻起身服事他們。

ccb.text: 耶稣站在她旁边，斥责热病，热病就退了，她便立刻起来服侍他们。

csbs.text: 耶稣就站在她旁边，斥责那高烧，烧就退了。她立刻起来，服事他们。
